series.title: Prinzessin Lillifee (TV-Serie)
series.curator_notes: Split from Prinzessin Lillifee. These are TV episode audiobooks (Das Hörspiel zur TV-Serie, episodes 01-06), a separate product from Gute-Nacht-Geschichten. Parents would expect them as a distinct series entry. Each album has 32-34 tracks of episode audio without the bedtime music/lullabies that characterize the Gute-Nacht-Geschichten series.

review.notes:
Auto-created by apply-splits.py from prinzessin_lillifee.
Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.

verification.concerns: Only 6 episodes included (2012), but Wikipedia indicates the TV series had 52 episodes. The included albums are authentic "Hörspiel zur TV-Serie" releases from Sony Music/Coppenrath with proper episode metadata (Folge 1-6). However, there are likely more episodes (7-52) that may exist on Spotify but were not captured in this curation — possibly because they use different naming conventions or weren't included in the original artist's discography. This is a minor gap but doesn't invalidate the current selection.
